title: alsine laricifolia subvar. glandulosa
intro: Alsine laricifolia subvar. glandulosa, also known as Creeping Saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant in the Saxifragaceae family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Creeping Saxifrage include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Creeping Saxifrage often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
